title: GL10 3SX, SCHLUMBERGER OILFIELD UK PLC: environmental permit issued – EPR/SP3731SC/S005
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: SCHLUMBERGER OILFIELD UK PLC   Installation name: Stonehouse Battery Factory   Permit number: EPR/SP3731SC/S005   "
